contextBlurb: South Carolina has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 1 is already enacted.

legislation.title: Data Center Development

legislation.title: Artificial intelligence, consumer protection
legislation.summary: Amend The South Carolina Code Of Laws By Enacting The "consumer Protections In Interactions With Artificial Intelligence Systems Act" By Adding Chapter 31 To Title 37 So As To, Among Other Things, Prohibit Algorithmic Discrimination Arising From The Use Of High-risk Artificial...

legislation.title: Autopsy photographs
legislation.summary: Amend The South Carolina Code Of Laws By Amending Section 17-5-535, Relating To Persons Authorized To View Photographs And Videos Of An Autopsy, So As To Restructure The Circumstances Under Which Photographs And Videos Of An Autopsy May Be Disseminated.

legislation.title: Commercial Data Center Water Usage Report
legislation.summary: Amend The South Carolina Code Of Laws By Adding Section 58-27-835 So As To Require Commercial Data Centers That Consume Three Million Gallons Of Water On A Monthly Basis To Annually Report Their Water Usage To The Department Of Environmental Services, To Provide Penalties, And...

legislation.title: The South Carolina Data Center Responsibility Act
legislation.summary: Amend The South Carolina Code Of Laws So As To Enact The "south Carolina Data Center Responsibility Act"; And By Adding Chapter 81 To Title 39 So As To Ensure That Data Centers Operating In South Carolina Do So Responsibly, Sustainably, And Without Burdening Taxpayers.
